note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 1.8 cm x 1.1 cm x 0.9 cm.
  Wound bed: 74% slough, 26% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — not improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 1.8 cm x 1.1 cm x 0.9 cm.
  Wound bed: 77% slough, 23% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — not improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Alginate dressing applied.
